General.Name: Standard Development Group Ltd
General.Description: Standard Development Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in construction and engineering related business in Mainland China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Construction and Engineering Related Business, Petroleum Business, Farming Business, and Bio-Energy Business segments. It provides interior design services, sales and construction consumables, and other related services. The company is involved in trading of petroleum; plantation, sale of agricultural produce, agricultural consumables and grain oil, farmland leasing, and other related business; collection of organic wastages; and production of renewable energy such as biogas. It serves contractors, landlords, and property developers, as well as trading business companies. The company was formerly known as LKS Holding Group Limited and changed its name to Standard Development Group Limited in September 2021. Standard Development Group Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Standard Development Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of FUJINCHENG INVESTMENT HOLDINGS CO., LTD.
General.Address: Cosco Tower, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
